description.ko: 디지털 노이즈와 색수차로 인해 분절된 날카로운 기하학적 패턴이 특징인 미래지향적 비주얼로, 하이테크 공간 속 KURO-X의 아이덴티티를 중심으로 표현했습니다.
description.en: A futuristic visual experience featuring sharp geometric patterns fractured by digital noise and chromatic aberration, centering the KURO-X identity within a high-tech void.

prompt: Highly detailed digital art of 'KURO-X' logo in a geometric glitch style. Sharp polygonal shards, fragmented typography, neon cyan and magenta chromatic aberration, digital artifacts, scan lines, abstract vector shapes, dark obsidian background, 8k resolution, cyberpunk aesthetic, high contrast.
